name: io.github.sairam0424/trelix
title: trelix
description: Semantic code search for AI agents — hybrid BM25+vector, call-graph, 20+ languages.

tools.name: search_code
tools.description: Search code using natural language — hybrid semantic + BM25 + call-graph

tools.name: index_codebase
tools.description: Index a repository for code search (run once)

tools.name: get_symbol
tools.description: Get the full source of a symbol by qualified name

tools.name: blast_radius
tools.description: Find all files that depend on a symbol

tools.name: build_knowledge_graph
tools.description: Build a knowledge graph (call/import/type edges, community detection) for an indexed codebase

tools.name: graph_search_mcp
tools.description: Graph-traversal search — find structurally related symbols via call/import/type edges

tools.name: subscribe_resource
tools.description: Register a subscription for a trelix:// resource URI

tools.name: unsubscribe_resource
tools.description: Deregister a resource subscription by its subscription ID

tools.name: federation_list_repos
tools.description: List all repos registered for federated (multi-repo) search

tools.name: federation_add_repo
tools.description: Register a repo for federated search across MCP tool calls

tools.name: federation_remove_repo
tools.description: Unregister a repo from federated search by alias

tools.name: federation_search_all
tools.description: Search across all registered repos simultaneously (federated search)

tools.name: ask_agent
tools.description: Ask a question using the multi-turn ReAct agentic loop, with persistent memory

tools.name: agent_list_sessions
tools.description: List recent agent sessions for a repo, most recently active first

tools.name: agent_clear_session
tools.description: Delete a persisted agent session and all its turn history
